author: Siam H.
pros: I prefer to use Copyleaks Plagiarism Checker mainly because: - The ease of access - The accuracy with which it detects plagiarism - Affordable pricing options
cons: I would not refer to it as something that I liked least about the software but at times it did flag specific words or phrases (such as surface tension, surface dilation) as plagiarized. I believe the accuracy can be improved in the newer versions.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Copyleaks a Great Plagiarism Checker for Professional Writers
description: Copyleaks along with Grammarly, and the Hemingway app are great tools for any professional writer to use. Copyleaks does an excellent job as a plagiarism checker and is really easy to use. I highly recommend!
author: Christian S.
pros: I have been a professional writer: a blogger, book author, and freelance writer the last year and have used Copyleaks extensively for checking plagiarism. They do a very thorough check from multiple websites to make sure you pass any plagiarism checks. Copyleaks also has a great online staff that is easy to contact if you have any issues or would like to set up some type of affiliate program.
cons: Well, I wish it had a longer trial period but it's cool that you don't need a subscription because there is a point-based system for use.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Unreliable Claims: A Critical Assessment of Copyleaks as an 'AI' Detector
author: Gabriel A.
pros: It can find plagiarism, but it flags unintentional plagiarism as "AI generated" which is highly misleading.
cons: Copyleaks, lacks reliability and should not be marketed as an "AI" detector. When a story summary exhibits close similarities, Copyleaks erroneously labels it as "AI," whereas it more accurately falls within the realm of unintentional plagiarism. Claiming to be "reliable" and "trustworthy" is deceptive advertising, misrepresenting the tool's true capabilities and accuracy.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Copyleaks is a game changer for any student or business. You no longer need to worry about the originality of your paper.
